What We’re Covering



Stefan Paul Georgi Copy Intensive





What We’ll Be Covering



Research Process

Insights into Demographics, Other Existing Solutions, Curiosity, Corruption, Where to Find Answers, For Nutra Ingredients, Important Notes



Mechanism Process

Mechanism Behind Problem, Mechanism Behind Solution, A Logical Question, Mechanism Examples, How the Mechanism Pre- Sells the Product For You



The Brief Process

Connecting Research + Mechanism Together, Pain Points, Promises, Paradoxical Questions, Metaphors, Product and Story, Examples.



Copy Process

Sales Letter Outline, Lead Types, Story Types, Product Types, Fascinations, AOV Money Close, Dissecting Examples.



Ad Creatives Process

Subject Line Matrix, Doing Live Examples, Stupid Easy Email Creatives in 10 minutes.





Plus Special Sections From:



Ian Stanley: Creating winning subject lines, email marketing campaigns, and headlines.

Tyler Bramlett: Email Deliverability Wins, Split-Tests That Work, LTV-Palooza

Dr. Gary Sanchez: Discovering Your Why





Basic Premises



Writing winning sales copy is not hard. It also doesn’t take a long time. Instead, it’s all about the process.



Most of us overcomplicate things dramatically.



We also think we need to be original “creative geniuses” when it’s just not the case.



Perfection is the enemy.



Writing a winning direct response piece can be boiled down to four simple steps: Research, Mechanism, Brief, and Copy.



Writing winning ad creatives takes about 10 minutes, should never take more than 30 mins.





















Research Module



Research



What We’re Looking For…



Insights Into Demographic :

Who Is Your Customer?

How Old Are They Typically?

What Attitudes Do They Have? (Religious, Political, Social, Economic)?

What Are Their Hopes and Dreams?

What Are Their Victories and Failures?

What Outside Forces Do THEY Believe Have Prevented Their Best Life?

What Are Their Prejudices?

Sum Up Their Core Beliefs About Life, Love, and Family In 1-3 Sentences.



Other Existing Solutions:

What is the Market Already Using? (List Out)

What Has Their Experience Been Like?

What Does the Market Like About Existing Solutions?

What Does the Market Dislike About Existing Solutions?

Are Their Horror Stories About Existing Solutions?

Does the Market Believe Existing Solution Works?

If Not, Why?



Curiosity:

Has Someone Tried to Solve the Market’s Pain Points Before In A Very Unique Way?

What Was The Result?

Is There A Conspiratorial Story Behind Why Old Solutions Didn’t Work?

Are There Any Older Attempts to Solve the Problem (Pre-1960) That Are Unique?

What Happened? Were they successful but forgotten? Or were they a failure? Why?



Examples:

Tesla in the energy space. Big energy didn’t want his solutions, he was discredited and shamed. His inventions and discoveries were thrown into the ash heap of history until now.

U.S. Army tried to cure foot fungus during WWII, surgeon general was on a desperate race because troops were missing service time. Finally succeeded by using Undecylenic Acid. But today we forget how effective it is.





Corruption:

Is There A Belief That the Market’s Pain Point Used To Not Exist, Or Used To Not Be So Bad?

Is There A Belief That It’s Been Recently Exacerbated By Outside Forces?



If So, What Are Those Forces And What’s The Reason Behind Their Presence?



Examples:

Diabetes and obesity used to be uncommon, but now they are common. People blame big corporations, processed foods, lazy Americans, sugar, etc. So many of these interests are commercial and greed that have forced or tricked people into an unhealthy lifestyle.



This isolated group of people doesn’t struggle from whatever condition/pain point that most of us do. In America we DO suffer from this pain point. The reason why is that we are exposed to these outside forces while this isolated group isn’t.



This renegade person doesn’t suffer from the same pain point as the rest of us. The reason why is that he’s managed to stay free from outside corruption, while the rest of us haven’t.





Where to Find The Answers to Our Research Questions?



Forums/Reddit:

Look for replies vs. views. Why? On a post, if lots of people view it that’s great, and there may be interest. But when there are a ton of REPLIES, it means people are really passionate, interested, and engaged.



Examples: https://www.reddit.com/r/fatpeoplestories/comments/28nuy3/a_rant_on_the_sad_reality_th at_is_often_type_2/

https://www.reddit.com/r/fatpeoplestories/ https://www.reddit.com/r/keto/ https://bitcointalk.org/

http://www.personaldefenseforum.net/showthread.php?814-Venezuela-A-Case-for-Prepping





Facebook Groups and Pages:

Similar to forums. Pay attention to the posts with the most engagement. Not interested in a ton of “likes.” Only semi-interested in a ton of “shares.” Really interested in a ton of comments and arguments.



Example:

https://www.facebook.com/Diabetes-Support-119703998103102/?ref=br_rs





YouTube:

Same thing again. I’d look for one that has a good amount of views. But then I’d also look at the engagement and comments.



Examples: https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=bitcoin+conspiracy&sp=CAM%253D https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h8iBKbubCxM





Comment Sections on Articles:

And same thing again.



Examples:

http://www.breitbart.com/

http://www.breitbart.com/london/2018/04/17/macron-europe-migration-destiny-africa/ https://conservativetribune.com/





Authority Figures / Influencers:

Has Dr. Oz/Kim Kardashian/Oprah/Sanjay Gupta/Hot Lifestyle Model/Mommy Blogger/Whoever been discussing a specific pain point or solution?



We laugh at Dr. Oz and the free trial guys (and straight sale guys too) have kind of turned it into a joke. But at the end of the day if Dr. Oz is talking about an ingredient or a product, then most baby-boomers believe It must be the greatest thing since sliced bread.



When looking at an authority figure or influencer’s website, article, Instagram post, blog, etc… Did they explain any science behind how problem works, or how the product acts as a solution?



Google:

It sounds simple but Googling the problem and solution is the best way to find information. Look at information from both Big Name sites and smaller ones. If you find something interesting, open a new tab, and start doing more research about it…



“How to” “How does” “What is” “Best ways to”

“Natural ways to” “Why do”

“	Benefits”



For Nutra:

Google: “Product name, humans, ncbi”.

Look for double blind studies and pay attention to dosages in there, and if the ingredients in your product match or exceed those dosages.

“Meta-Analysis” articles are super useful too. https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC5664031/



https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4609100/ More Places to Go…

Examine.com (Go To Human Effects Matrix For Studies)

DrAxe.com

WhFoods.com

OrganicFacts.net



Amazon.Com

No surprise here of course. But perfect for looking at similar products on the market, and reading reviews of them too. This works for both indirectly compete products, and direct competitors.

Look at 5 Star Reviews and 1 Star Reviews.

Look at the FAQs as this will help know what your market is wondering about.

Look at similar products customers have bought.

Look at product features/benefits/claims.



Examples:

https://www.amazon.com/Turmeric-Curcumin-Bioperine-Joint- Relief/dp/B0112M60KI/ref=sr_1_1_sspa?s=hpc&ie=UTF8&qid=1523981225&sr=1-1- spons&keywords=turmeric+curcumin&psc=1



https://www.amazon.com/Penn-Plax-Aquaponic-Promotes- Environment/dp/B012QGR2TC/ref=sr_1_5?ie=UTF8&qid=1523981281&sr=8- 5&keywords=aquaponics





IMPORTANT Notes:



Through your research you’ll typically end up getting the kernel for the mechanism behind the problem and the solution.



If you find a unique solution to the problem, and your product fits it, don’t be afraid to fit the two together.



For example:



If you have a weight loss product…

And your product is geared towards helping with metabolism…

You find a lot of research about how metabolism is governed by the thyroid hormone… You may want to bridge-the-gap, and have your product talk about…

Which means making your copy about how a dysfunctional thyroid is the real cause of your poor metabolism.





Rabbit holes are your friend (within reason). I’ve found some of my most interesting unique mechanisms and my best stories by going down rabbit holes.



Examples:



Maybe you’re looking at doing a DIY solar generator. You see someone’s name as an early inventor of a prototype. You look into the prototype and find out it had a novel mechanism of action. That’s all great fodder for copy.



Recently writing a new offer for foot fungus. It has an ingredient called undecylenic acid in it. End up finding a U.S. Military Medical History about how during WWII, U.S. soldiers were PLAGUED by foot fungus. It was so bad it caused almost 10% of our soldiers to miss time in action. The U.S. Surgeon general at the time went on a desperate quest to find something that would control fungus. Ultimately they discovered that undecylenic acid was superior to all the rest.





















Unique Mechanism



Unique Mechanism



In a Nutshell:

The unique mechanism explains why our prospect is struggling or suffering to achieve a goal… And how they can overcome that problem.

At its core, the unique mechanism is always a two-part logical connection.



The Reason It’s Important:

Typically by the time our prospect comes to us, they’ve tried numerous solutions to their problem already. In the past, these other solutions may have not worked at all, worked partially, or worked fully for a period of time (before they stopped working).



Our job as a copywriter is to educate our prospect about the REAL reason why past solutions didn’t bring them permanent results. We do this by explaining that their knowledge about the problem is incomplete. They’ve been missing ONE CRUCIAL PIECE OF INFORMATION, and this “knowledge gap” is what’s been holding them back.





There are two parts to the unique mechanism:



Unique Mechanism Behind the Problem our Prospect Faces.



Unique Mechanism Behind the Solution to that Problem.



It’s important to identify the unique mechanism behind both the problem AND the solution.



By showing the unique mechanism behind the problem, you get the prospect to understand why they’ve failed in the past.



By showing the unique mechanism behind the solution, you get the prospect to believe that our product will bring them success where other alternatives have failed.





Typically there the unique mechanism is presented in one of two different ways: Problem -> Solution -> Avatar Created/Found Product That Matches Solution

Problem -> Product Category Type Is The Solution -> Specific Product Is THE Superior Type of Solution



We will now look at both types.

















Mechanism Example: Salus Structured Silver

Mechanism Type: Problem -> Product Category Type Is Solution



















Mechanism Behind The Problem



And from my medical training…



Along with my constant reviewing of the latest in health research…



It was clear to me that pretty much all of these issues probably stemmed from a sick gut.



























Now I’m going to explain why having an unhealthy gut is responsible for the vast majority of your health challenges…



And I want you to pay close attention…



Because once you understand why your gut is “sick” right now… You’ll also understand how simple it is to heal it.

Why Your Gut Holds the Key to Sickness (or Health).

At any given moment your body has more than a hundred trillion tiny, invisible organisms living inside of it.



They’re called “microbes”…



And they include bacteria, fungi, and even viruses.





















Caption: A picture of your gut’s microbiome.





Now while the idea of having trillions of tiny creatures living inside you might sound creepy… The truth is that they are ESSENTIAL to your health.

You see: most of these microbes live within your digestive tract (also known as your gut)... And they are responsible for a wide variety of important actions, including:

How well your immune system functions…



Your body’s ability to detoxify itself…



The production of neurotransmitters…



Your ability to breakdown and absorb vitamins and nutrients…



Whether you feel hungry or full…



And how your body breaks down carbohydrates and fats (which affects your blood sugar levels and your body weight).



In other words…



The bacteria in your gut acts like a “control center”…

















Something that’s responsible for virtually every process that’s essential to your health.



At least that’s what happens when your gut is healthy…



But when bad bacteria and toxins enter your system and begin to overrun your gut… It can lead to life-ruining, and even deadly inflammation.

What’s Inflammation?

Inflammation can be a normal and healthy response in the body… For example, if you cut your thumb…

Your body releases immune cells, hormones, and nutrients to fix the problem...



And white blood cells swarm to the cut to digest germs, dead or injured cells, and other foreign materials…



All in an effort to keep you from having an infection.



As a result of all this, your cut thumb will probably turn red, swell, and even experience a burning sensation as it happens…



Or in other words, it will be inflamed.



In a normal and healthy person, inflammation is a short-term response to injury or harm…



But when inflammation doesn’t stop…



And instead becomes “chronic” and ongoing…



It can lead to a whole host of problems.



Long-term inflammation can cause osteoarthritis…



Autoimmune diseases like lupus, rheumatoid arthritis, allergies, asthma, inflammatory bowel disease, and Crohn’s...



And it’s been linked directly to heart disease, increased rates of type-2 diabetes, cancer, depression, and even dementia and Alzheimer’s!



Now you’re probably asking…



















What Does Inflammation Have To Do With My Gut?

The answer is a LOT.



Remember, inflammation is trigged by your immune system…



And according to best-selling author and medical doctor David Perlmutter…



Your gut is home to between 70 and 80 percent of your body’s immune system.



So when pathogenic bacteria, viruses, fungi, and toxins assault your gut on a regular basis…



Your gut’s immune system responds by releasing inflammatory molecules that are harmful to your health.



The most infamous of these inflammatory molecules are cytokines…



And having high levels of these cytokines have been linked to a higher risk of stroke, heart attack, Alzheimer’s diseasei, cancer, and a whole host of additional health concerns…



Along with more than 100 autoimmune diseases that vary from fibromyalgia to psoriasis!





















Here’s How Pathogenic Bacteria Take Over Your Gut and Make You Sick…

There are a variety of ways that pathogens can enter your digestive system and cause gut inflammation...



For some of us, it starts at birth…



As research shows that babies who are born via C-section are much more likely to be exposed to bad bacteria during delivery…



And that this bad bacteria can stick with us for the rest of our lives. ii iii

































For others, the build-up of inflammation-causing pathogens starts happening when we’re toddlers…



Then continues year-after-year…



Through continued exposure to toxins in the air we breathe, the antibiotics and medications we take, the food we eat, the beverages we drink, and the surfaces we touch.



It’s Actually Shocking How Easily Toxins and Pathogens Can Disrupt Our Gut Health

For example, consider a common toxin in pesticides called glyphosate.



Glyphosate is used on many industrial crops and foods that end up making their way into the supermarket…

Then Of Course There’s All of the Common Additives in the Foods and Drinks We Love…

Like emulsifiers, which are found in many brands of ice cream, chocolate bars, mayonnaise, and packaged snacks.



Emulsifiers are what give these foods a smooth, stable consistency…



Yet according to new research published in the prestigious journal Nature…



These emulsifiers could very well increase the risk of inflammatory disease and metabolic disorders like diabetes and obesity…



By altering bacteria in the intestinal tract!ix







And Artificial Sweeteners Might Be Even Worse…

As, ironically enough, there is emerging research suggesting that they alter our gut bacteria in a way that leads to obesity and possibly even Type 2 diabetes!x xi

























So To Sum Up Everything So Far…

Your gut is home to trillions of bacteria and microorganisms…



These microorganisms are responsible for virtually every factor in your health...

















Over the years, foreign invaders like toxins, bacteria, and fungi build up inside of you…



They change your gut’s “make up” from one with primarily healthy bacteria to one with primarily pathogenic (or harmful) bacteria…



And these pathogens trigger a negative response in your gut’s immune system…



Which leads to chronic inflammation that increases your risk of hundreds of major diseases and conditions.

















Mechanism Behind The Solution





The Special Mixture Dr. Frank Was Talking About Is Called Structured Silver…



And the way you make structured silver is by bonding pure silver particles to a very pure form of structured water in a unique way.



Now the reason this ‘bonding’ process is important is because it permanently connects the silver particles to the water…



Allowing the structured silver molecules to travel through your body, and then be flushed out several hours later when you pee.



This is really important for two reasons…



The first is that colloidal silvers and other similar products on the market aren’t “energetically bonded” to water in the way that Structured Silver is…



Which means if you use most commercial brands of liquid silver…



You could have silver building up in your system over the years, which you definitely don’t want.



And secondly…



Because of the special energetic bonding of Structured Silver… From the moment it enters your mouth…

As it travels down your throat, into your bloodstream, through your intestines and gut… And as it’s finally expelled through your kidneys and bladder…

It destroys virtually all of the bad bacteria, pathogens, viruses, and fungus that it comes into contact with.



In other words, it’s like “flushing” all of the harmful and negative bacteria, viruses, and germs out of your body from head-to-toe…



While leaving all of the “good” bacteria completely unharmed.



















Pretty remarkable, right?

And of course, you’re probably wondering…



How Exactly Does Structured Silver Kill Bad Bacteria Inside My Gut?

Well here’s the answer…



Silver particles are “missing” an electron from their outer ring… And as a result…

When silver comes into contact with bacteria, viruses, or yeast… The silver attempts to steal an electron from the pathogen.

Now, because pathogens have simple water soluble cell walls made of single electrons… When silver steals an electron from pathogens, it ruptures the pathogen’s cell…

Kind of like if you were to “pop” a water balloon…



And this usually kills the pathogen right then and there.





Watch: A Microscope View of Silver Killing Bacteria



https://youtu.be/AZrAOKBLG-Q



Now that alone would be enough to make Structured Silver an incredibly important health breakthrough…



But that’s still just the start.



In addition to its electric charge…



Structured Silver’s magnetic energy also holds silver’s atoms together in a crystal structure… This magnetic, crystallized structure creates tiny pulses of healthy electromagnetic energy… And when Structured Silver molecules come into contact with germs and bacteria…



















These tiny healthy pulses of energy fire into the pathogens and prevent their DNA from replicating…



Kind of like a tiny magnetic spear.



Pretty amazing right?



And if you’re asking how it is that Structured Silver only kills bad bacteria and germs in your body, and not the good ones…



There’s actually a pretty simple answer for that too.



Why Structured Silver Doesn’t Destroy Healthy Cells Or Good Bacteria In Your Gut

Healthy cells have a lipid bilayer…



Which is a fancy way of saying that they stop water soluble absorption. . As a result…

Structured silver leaves your healthy cells intact… Where they are free to thrive and nourish your body.



Additionally, because probiotic (good) bacteria in the gut have a special coating of milk fat around their outer wall…



These “beneficial” bacteria in your gut are also protected, and aren’t damaged or punctured. All of which is to say that Structured Silver is the perfect natural defender of your body… Because it ONLY kills bad bacteria and unhealthy cells…



















While keeping good bacteria and healthy cells 100% untouched!

So let’s take a quick moment to understand what all of this means and why it’s important to you and your life.

And this inflammation can lead to leaky gut, and a host of autoimmune conditions and symptoms, along with over a hundred different health challenges.

Is the realization that many of these pathogens, bacteria, viruses, and fungi can be easily, safely, and cost-effectively destroyed…



Simply by sipping a few tablespoons of Structured Silver each day.

Mechanism Example: Total Thyroid

Mechanism Type: Problem -> Solution -> Create Product Type That Matches Solution



Mechanism Behind The Problem





Your metabolism is all of the processes that go on in your body in order to sustain your life. Including the way your body converts food to energy…

The depth and duration of your sleep… The way your skin looks…

And even your mood.



And metabolism is pretty much entirely controlled by a very important gland in your body called the Thyroid gland.



The Thyroid gland produces the Thyroid hormone.



And Thyroid hormones work in your body a lot like spark plugs work in a car.



They ignite fuel in your body’s cells, so that the cells can perform your bodily functions. That means nearly all of your body’s functions depend on how strong your Thyroid gland is! So picture food traveling down your throat and into your stomach…

Certain cells and enzymes in your body are meant to convert that food into energy… But if your Thyroid gland isn’t producing the optimal level of the Thyroid hormone… The spark plug never ignites…

The food never gets converted to energy…



It instead gets stored as the fat on your stomach, legs, butt, thighs, chest, and everywhere else you don’t want it …



And you don’t get any of the boosted, sustained energy you’re supposed to get from your food. In fact, the increasing storage of fat just makes you feel more and more tired.

It works the same way for falling into a restful sleep…



No spark plugs to signal your brain to fall asleep? You’ll have exhausting nights of tossing and turning.

It works the same way for having a balanced, happy mood…



No spark plugs to release the hormones responsible for a good mood? Then you’ll have mood swings, depression, and anxiety.

It works the same way for making sure your brain stays sharp and alert too… 20% of your body’s energy goes towards powering your brain…

No spark plugs sending the energy from food to your brain?



Then you’ll have brain fog, mental crashes, be forgetful, and constantly feel “slow” and “out of it”.



Mechanism Behind The Solution



And so I set out to find the best way to safely, but dramatically, improve the condition of her Thyroid levels.



And that’s what you need to do so that you can more easily lose weight… Have energy…

And feel better in your body than you have in years or even decades…



Just like the thousands of people who were feeling just like you not that long ago. It involves a scientifically-backed 3-step method for healing the Thyroid…

Called the CAR method:



Step 1: Construct Thyroid Hormones Step 2: Absorb Thyroid Hormones Step 3: Receive Thyroid Hormones



Construct, Absorb, Receive, C-A-R, easy to remember right?



Let’s start with Step 1, Constructing Thyroid Hormones Naturally…



What’s really important to understand here is how exactly the Thyroid gland creates Thyroid hormones in the first place.



It happens through a natural chemical reaction inside of your body… Where your Thyroid gland takes the chemical Iodine…

And converts it into the two types of Thyroid hormones your body uses like spark plugs, T3 and T4.



That makes Iodine one of the most important nutrients your Thyroid gland needs to work really well.



No Iodine, means no Thyroid hormones, means no spark plugs… Meaning all of the processes controlled by your metabolism… Like weight loss, sleep, and energy are sluggish and poor.





But here’s the catch…



Your body doesn’t produce Iodine naturally.



You have to get it from the nutrients you take in. Well as it turns out…

The two best sources of getting the natural, healthy Iodine you need, come from the sea. The first is from Kelp.

Now you already know that almost every sea in the world has kelp in it… But you may not have known that kelp is an amazing source of iodine.

Not only that, but Kelp is also one of the most promising treatments for thyroid in existence. In a study published in the journal of Endocrine Practice…

Researchers concluded that: “short-term dietary supplementation with kelp significantly increases both basal and post stimulation TSH [thyroid stimulating hormone].”i



While in another study, this one published in the journal Clinical Endocrinology…



Researchers found that giving kelp supplementation to healthy men led to a “significant increase in the serum TSH response”…causing better regulated production of the two thyroid hormones T3 and T4.ii



And in yet another study, this one published in Clinical Pediatric Endocrinology… Where test subjects had been given powdered kelp once a day…

The scientists were shocked to see that the daily use of kelp had “restored their thyroid function and normalized their UICs [urinary iodine concentration].”iii



The other best source of potent, healthy Iodine that the Thyroid gland loves to convert into Thyroid hormones T3 and T4 is called Bladderwrack.



Bladderwrack is a type of seaweed…



And just like Kelp, it has a significantly high concentration of iodine in it…



And has not only been shown to help support healthy thyroid function…



But to also have powerful potential for weight loss, liver health, and fighting cancer.



For example, in a 2016 study published in the journal BMC Complementary and Alternative Medicine…



Bladderwrack was shown to kill breast cancer, endometrial cancer, and ovarian cancer cells with startling effectiveness…while also having “anti-tumorigenic actions.”iv



And in another 2016 study, this one published in the Journal of Applied Phycology…



Bladderwrack showed a “significant inhibition of lipase [the enzyme responsible for breaking down fats]”…leading the researchers to suggest it as a powerful “potential weight loss tool deserving of further investigation.”v



So now we’re getting somewhere incredible…



We have two pure and potent sources of the Iodine your body needs to create the spark plugs, Thyroid hormones T3 and T4, that get your metabolism working awesomely.



Let’s move on to Step 2… Absorb Thyroid Hormones…

The next key step to optimizing your Thyroid levels is for your T3 and T4 hormones to be well- absorbed into the cells of your bloodstream…



After all, if only 5% of your T3 and T4 gets used up by your cells, then you’re only getting 5% of the power of your spark plugs…



And all of the T3 and T4 your body is making can go to waste… Without you feeling any of the benefits of it…

That’s why the following 3 essential minerals are so crucial to our recipe…



They do an incredible job of helping your T3 and T4 get up to 100% absorbed into your cells… Those minerals are Selenium, Magnesium, and Zinc.

Numerous studies show that the majority of Americans are deficient in at least one of these minerals.



So it’s crucial that we add these to our recipe for optimal Thyroid function and metabolism performance.



Which brings us to Step 3… Receive Thyroid Hormones… Now that your body is producing T3 and T4…

And it’s getting absorbed into your body’s cells… It’s time for you to RECEIVE all of the benefits!

This means you must make sure your cells are able to actually use and metabolize your Thyroid hormones.



And because everyone’s cells deteriorate as they get older…



They aren’t able to make the best use of the Thyroid hormones anymore…



That’s why this may just be the most crucial, but unfortunately most often overlooked, step of all.



So the two ingredients that make sure your cells are ready to use up all of your Thyroid hormones…



Are Copper and Manganese.



Their effectiveness at helping the body get the maximum benefit out of T3 and T4 have been shown numerous times over…



For example…



A 2016 study in the Journal of Environmental Health found that an increased uptake of Copper and Manganese led to higher levels of T3 and T4 being metabolized in the bloodstreamvi…



While in a 2014 study published in the journal Biological Trace Elements Research…



It was found that thyroid-stimulating hormones were raised significantly in test subjects who were given a supplementary dosage of elements including Copper and Manganese.vii



So to recap all of this one more time…



The key to healing your Thyroid, and seeing and feeling your metabolism perform better than ever…



Is by following the simple, 3-step CAR protocol:



Step 1: Construct Thyroid Hormones Step 2: Absorb Thyroid Hormones

and Step 3: Receive Thyroid Hormones



So Step 1 is like creating the spark plugs you need to power your car, which is your body… Step 2 is the same as installing those spark plugs into the vehicle…

And Step 3 is starting the engine and pressing your foot to the pedal!

Mechanism Example: Salus Structured Silver

Mechanism Type: Problem -> Product Category Type Is Solution



Mechanism Behind The Problem







How We Get Infected With Fungus In The First Place…

As you probably already know…



It’s pretty easy to get a fungal infection.



Places like gyms, locker-rooms, hot-tubs, saunas, steam rooms, and showers… Are all hot-beds for these types of fungal infections…

As are places that have warm and moist climates. To make matters worse…

The elderly and Type 2 diabetics are especially at risk of fungal infections (I’ll explain why in a moment)…



Plus it’s not just warm and moist environments where fungus can thrive…



Many types of fungus – including things like athlete’s foot, jock itch, and toenail fungus…



Can be contagious…



And there are forms of fungal infections that can make their way to our body through the air we breathe and the surfaces we touch…



Meaning that pretty much everyone at earth is at risk of a fungal infection.













So What Happens Once You Come Into Contact With Fungus?

Well the short answer is that it starts to spread.



You see…



Fungus have long branches that are called hyphae…



And you can think of them as being similar to the roots of a tree.



Once infected, your fungal infection feeds off your skin, your nails, or your hair… Which in turn allows the hyphae (or roots) to grow…

Spreading further and deeper…



Covering more of the surface of your skin, hair or nails… While also penetrating your skin and becoming “embedded.”

What’s even creepier is the fact that these hyphae are self-replicating…



Which means that they can continue to reproduce and create new fungal cells again and again… All of which makes your fungal infection increasingly difficult to kill.

Make sense?



Good because this is important to understanding why it’s so hard to kill your fungal infection…



The fungus continues to self-replicate which means it’s hard to kill all of it at once…



And because the fungus burrows into your nails, skin, and hair…



Many surface treatments aren’t effective since they don’t penetrate deep enough into the infected area.



This explains why so many people suffer from reoccurring fungus by the way…



Because even when their skin or nails clear up… There’s still fungus buried deep inside…

Like a ticking time bomb just waiting to explode.



And this also explains why folks with poor circulation are more likely to get fungal infections…



Because your white blood cells can kill foreign invaders like fungus…



But when circulation is bad, you don’t get as many white blood cells to the infected area... And your fungal infection keeps digging deeper and deeper.



Mechanism Behind The Solution





And I Started Wondering If Undecylenic Acid Could Be The Key To Treating Foot Fungus Today?

So I began researching everything I could about undecylenic acid…



And I was surprised to discover that many modern OTC products contain this ingredient today.



Plus through my research I also uncovered the reason why undecylenic acid is so effective in treating fungus…



And it’s actually pretty simple.



Remember what I told you earlier about fungal infections…



How the fungus on your skin continues to “self-replicate” and branch out further and further… While also burrowing deep inside of you…

Meaning that even when you destroy a fungal infection on the surface… It can still be “embedded” inside of you…

Where it simply starts over again and continues to grow and spread?



Well research has now shown that undecylenic acid prevents fungal cells (hyphae) from creating new “branches”…



Which means that once you apply undecylenic acid to an infected area… The fungus on your skin can longer continue to replicate.i

As a result, once you’ve treated your fungal infection with undecylenic acid… It slowly starts to die off…

Restoring your skin to it’s clear and unblemished natural state. In other words…

Adding undecylenic acid to your fungal infection is like cutting off all the oxygen to a fire.





Once you do that…



The fire stops spreading, loses strength, and eventually burns out.



Well it’s the same thing with your fungal infection…



Once you add undecylenic acid…



The fungal infection is “starved” of the fuel it needs to spread…



And it stops burning and dies out.



I Should Mention That This Isn’t Just A Theory By The Way…

There’s actually a TON of research showing that undecylenic acid can treat even severe cases of foot fungus…



And that it helps with ringworm, jock itch, and even nail fungus too.



This includes a 2001 study….



Which found that undecylenic acid is 21% more effective than the next best treatment for foot fungusii…



And another study from 2008…



Where 154 patients with mild, moderate, and severe nail fungal diseases used undecylenic acid regularly for an extended period of time…



And it was found that undecylenic acid was:

100% effective in eliminating mild nail fungus

65% effective in eliminating moderate nail fungus

And 35% effective in eliminating even the most severe cases of nail fungusiii.



In Fact, Undecylenic Acid Is Even Approved By The FDA…

Who wrote explicitly that people selling Undecylenic Acid can say that…



It can be used “for the cure of” most athlete’s foot, jock itch, and ringworm…



That it provides effective relief from the itching, scaling, cracking, burning, and chafing associated with jock itch…





That it provides relief from the “itchy scaly skin between the toes” and “itching burning feet”…



And that it’s even been “proven effective in the prevention of” most forms of athlete’s foot with daily use.iv

Brief



The brief is where we take our research and our mechanism and put it all together. By answering all of the questions in the brief, we’ll now have everything we need to start writing the copy.



We’ll jump right into the brief template and go through it step-by-step. Then we’ll look at three brief examples.

















1. Who’s the Audience? 

Men over the age of 40 years old who suffer from prostate problems along with E.D. They are typically on the conservative side, many are married, they are Christian, a lot of them voted for Trump. Probably primarily white.  

 

 

2. What are the pain points, or biggest fears? 

(+ identify the 1-3 HUGE ones, while the rest are secondary) 

 

- Short Term: 

 

Prostate Physical: Constant urge to pee, late night bathroom trips interrupting your sleep, feeling like your bladder isn’t emptying all the way, dribbling, painful urination, hesitation and straining.  

 

Prostate Emotional: Feeling like an “old man”, feeling frustrated by the constant need to go, being angered that your body no longer works like it used to. Like your body is breaking down.  

 

ED Physical: Can’t get erect, can’t stay erect, can’t ejaculate, or ejaculate to soon, don’t have stamina, shrinking libido.  

 

ED Emotional: Feeling like “less of a man”, feeling incomplete, embarrassed, anxious about the idea of having sex at all, anxious about performance, sick of dependence  on ED pills, feeling like you have this secret. You may act like a “man” around all your buddies, but the truth is you become a whimpering, impotent CUCK in the bedroom. Fear she’ll leave you, that she’s no longer satisfied. It’s probably tearing your relationship apart.  

 

 

-Long Term: 

 

Prostate: BPH can lead to urinary tract infections, bladder stones, blood in your urine, peeing yourself, and urinary retention, which is the sudden and complete inability to urinate. If it continues, you need emergency medical care. Also can lead to bladder and kidney damage. You might need a catheter which is humiliating. Or adult diapers. Estimated 25 million seniors are incontinent.  

 

 

3. So by reversing the pain points/biggest fears, what is the one big promise (1-3 sentences) you are going to make…how this will change their lives forever? 

 

There is a simple and easy way to reduce your prostate size while also improving flow and force of your urine stream. It’s 100% natural and it doesn’t just cut down on both the feeling to go, and the frequency of bathroom trips… 



















It also can reverse your ED rapidly, giving you the powerful, thick, and rock hard erections you had when you were young. Plus you’ll be able to do all of this with ZERO medications and no dangerous side effects. And it’s been proven to work in dozens of double-blind, human clinical trials.





















































Commented [SG1]: https://www.webmd.com/men/p rostate-enlargement-bph/enlarged-prostate-types- medication-that-work#1





What solutions for the reader’s problem (s) exist already (and why aren’t they working for them)?



Traditionally BPH drugs have helped with prostate issues in two ways…

Alpha-blockers are drugs that help relax muscles near the prostate to relieve pressure and let urine flow more freely, but they don’t shrink the size of the prostate.

Alpha Blocker Drugs Include: Uroxatral, Cardura, Minipress, Rapaflo, Flowmax, Hytrin.

Side Effects: dizziness, headache, fatigue, low blood pressure, They can also lead to “retrograde ejaculation” where sperm go backward into your bladder instead of out through your penis!



5 Alpha-Reductase Inhibitors are drugs that help shrink the prostate. They relieve symptoms by blocking the activity of an enzyme known as 5 alpha-reductase. 5AR changes testosterone into DHT, which stimulates prostate growth. When the action of 5AR is blocked, DHT production is lowered and prostate growth slows. Alpha Blocker Drugs Include: Propecia, Proscar, Avodart

Side Effects: Erectile dysfunction, Lower Sex Drive, Retrograde Ejaculation!



There are also lots of other natural prostate supplements out there. But most of these formulas only focus on one of the causes of BPH. The reality is there are two parts to treating BPH. The first is to relax bladder and prostate cells, so that urine can flow more easily. The second is to shrink the size of your prostate, so there’s less blockage.



Additionally most of these supplements come from random sources. Do you really know where they come from? Do you really trust them? You need PURE, high quality ingredients for the best results.





What’s the new claim/root cause/surprising info? And how does this new solution we’re offering them work?

(Think about it as if they had 99% of the solution already, but you’re sharing that missing 1%...the easy but unexpected REAL REASON, or REAL SECRET to their success).



It’s that most of the solutions out there only do one of two things. They either relax prostate cells or they shrink prostate. But you need to do BOTH for the best results.

















On top of this, there’s also the fact that the most important chemical in your body for getting erections, cGMP, is contained in your prostate and your bladder. Right now you can’t release it because of the swelling and blockage. Which means you suffer from ED as a result. Oh and also, it’s estimated that 60% of people with BPH (enlarged prostate) don’t even know they suffer. So while you may not think you suffer from ED as a result, the truth is that you absolutely do.

What’s The Unique Mechanism?



Another Crack At Mechanism:



The prostate gland is located directly below the bladder and above the urethra and penis.







When you’re 20 years old your prostate is about the size of a walnut. By age 40 it’s the size of an apricot, and by the age of 60 it’s the size of a lemon. Interestingly enough, according to Harvard, 50-60% of men with enlarged prostate (BPH) never show any symptoms when it comes to urine issues. Additionally this prostate growth (BPH) has also now been linked by numerous health experts to erectile dysfunction.



It’s also important that you understand that inside both the bladder and prostate there are two important chemicals. The first is called cGMP and the second is called PDE-5.



cGMP is the chemical that tells your body to send blood to the penis, giving you erections. PDE-5 is the chemical that signals to your body that it’s time to end your erection. You can think of cGMP as a “green light” and PDE-5 as a “red light.”

















Most major ED drugs do exactly this by the way, they’re called PDE-5 inhibitors because they “mute” PDE-5 so that your body can send adequate amounts of cGMP into the blood stream, which in turn leads to thick, full, long-lasting erections.



So anyways, as your prostate grows bigger it presses against your bladder. This makes it harder for your bladder to squeeze urine into the urethra. As a result of that, your bladder muscles thicken because it requires more “force” to push urine out of your body. The side effect of this is your bladder becoming more sensitive, which leads to the feelings of urgency and frequency.



Then as your prostate gets even LARGER, the connection between your bladder and urethra becomes partially blocked. The result is that your bladder doesn’t empty fully, and you always feel like you need to pee.



A side-effect of these things is that your bladder and prostate aren’t able to release as much cGMP into your bloodstream. And as cGMP is responsible for giving you erections, that’s a big problem.











































So it’s no wonder that major medical institutions now agree that there’s a link between BPH and ED (share sources and studies).



Traditionally BPH drugs have helped with prostate issues in two ways…

5 Alpha-Reductase Inhibitors are drugs that help shrink the prostate. They relieve symptoms by blocking the activity of an enzyme known as 5 alpha-reductase. 5AR changes testosterone into DHT, which stimulates prostate growth. But both of those types of drugs are filled with chemicals and come with side effects. Additionally traditional 5AR drugs have been shown to actually increase erectile dysfunction (https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2017/06/170622110452.htm)



That’s why we searched to find natural ingredients that would relax prostate cells, so that you could enjoy an easier, faster, flow….while also stopping DHT in the body and reducing the size of your prostate. These ingredients are:



Nettle



https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/15045190 Journal: Of Urology (2004)

Research: Randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled multicenter study for 1 year. 246 patients given 459mg of stinging nettle root.

Findings: Prostate size reduced. Nettle “can therefore be considered a safe therapeutic option for BPS.”





https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/16635963 Journal of Herbal Pharmacotherapy

















Methodology: Randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled, crossover study. Lasted 6 months with 620 patients.

Results: 81% of patients in nettle group reported improvements to lower urinary tract symptoms, compared to 16% in the placebo group. Prostate symptoms were reduced by nearly 50%.

Conclusion: “Urtica dioica have beneficial effects in the treatment of symptomatic BPH.”





https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3589769/ Journal: Iran Red Crescent Journal (2013)

Methodology: Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo Controlled Study in 100 Men, between ages of 40 and 80 years old. Lasted two months. Average age 62.4 years old.

Summary: BHP is a common disease observed in 90 percent of men. 50% of men between ages of 51 to 60, and 90 percent of men over 80, have historically been diagnosed with BPH.

Results: Average score reduced from 26.511 to 2.118. So Basically reduced by 93% while placebo group saw no significant reduction.

Conclusion: “Nettle had a better effect in relieving clinical symptoms of BPH patients compared to placebo.” “In three clinical trials on BPH patients, nettle had a better impact in reducing patients’ clinical symptoms than placebo. As a whole nettle is recommended to be used more in treatment of BPH patients, given its beneficial effects in reducing BPH patients’ symptoms and its safety in terms of its side effects and its being better accepted on the side of patients.”



Saw Palmetto



https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/22522969 Saw Palmetto Fruit Extract

Journal: Phytotherapy Research (2013)

Methodology: Open, multicentric clinical pilot trail with eighty-two participants for 8 weeks.

Results: International Prostate Symptom Score was reduced from 14.4 to 6.9 (53%) and Sexual Function improved from 22.4% to 31.4% (40%).

“Investigators and patients assessments confirmed the good efficacy, and treatment was very well tolerated and accepted by patients.”



https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/12674456 American Family Physician 2003

“Studies have demonstrated the effectiveness of saw palmetto in reducing symptoms associated with benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH). Saw palmetto appears to have efficacy similar to that of medications like finasteride, but it is better tolerated and less expensive. There are no known drug interactions with saw palmetto, and reported side effects are minor and rare.”

















https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/9609640 Urology (1998)

50 men with previously untreated lower urinary tract symptoms and BPH. Given Saw Palmetto 160mg twice per day for 6 months. Meassured on the International Prostate Symptom Score (IPSS)

Results: IPSS (aka prostate symptoms) improved from 19.5 to 12.5. (a 35% reduction). “Significant improvement in the symptom score was noted after treatment with saw palmetto for 2 months. An improvement in symptom score of 50% or greater after treatment with saw palmetto for 2, 4, and 6 months was noted in 21%, 30%, and 46% respectively.

Conclusion: “Saw palmetto is a well tolerated agent that may significantly improve lower urinary tract symptoms in men with BPH.”





Stinging Nettle + Saw Palmetto



https://prostate.net/articles/stinging-nettle-prostatitis-treatment



In a clinical trial, 257 patients were randomized to receive a combination of 160 mg daily of saw palmetto plus 120 mg of stinging nettle twice a day or placebo. The double-blind segment of the study was followed by an open control period of 24 weeks during which all patients were administered the natural ingredients. The tolerability of the natural supplements was comparable to the placebo, and the authors concluded that the natural formula was clearly superior to the placebo for the amelioration of LUTS as measured by the International Prostate Symptom Score. (Lopatkin 2007).



In another study, a subgroup of 431 patients with early stage BPH was evaluated from a randomized, double-blind, multicenter clinical trial that involved 543 patients. The men were randomly given a fixed herbal combination of saw palmetto extract and stinging nettle root or the 5-alpha-reductase inhibitor Proscar (finasteride). After 24 weeks, the mean maximum urinary flow rate increased by 1.9 ml/second in men who took the natural supplements and by 2.4 ml/second in the Proscar group. Men in both groups showed similar improvements in prostate size and in their values on the International Prostate Symptom Score. A safety analysis of 516 patients showed that more men in the Proscar group reported adverse effects than did those in the natural supplement group. The authors concluded that the efficacy of the natural supplement formula and Proscar was similar and unrelated to prostate volume, but that patients tolerated the natural supplement formula better compared to Proscar (Sokeland 2000).











Horny Goat Weed (Epimedium)



















http://www.healthline.com/health/erectile-dysfunction/horny-goat- weed?tre=true&rd=2#does-it-work5



Contains Icariin which is a powerful PDE5 inhibitor.

Icariin inhibits the activity of the PDE5 that’s blocking dilation of the arteries in the penis. This allows blood to fill the arteries and the three cylinders in the penis and create an erection. The prescription medication sildenafil (Viagra) works in much the same way.



https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3551978/ Journal of Sexual Medicine (2013)

Methodology: Placebo controlled, with rats

Results: Basically increased Nitric Oxide and potentially led to stronger erections. http://pubs.acs.org/doi/pdf/10.1021/np800049y



https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/16751992 Asian Journal of Andrology (2006)

Randomized, controlled study (rats).

Results: “Icariin improved the condition of reproductive organs and increased the circulating levels of testosterone.” It also helped with E.D.





Eurycoma Longifolia 100:1 (Root)





https://examine.com/supplements/eurycoma-longifolia-jack/



Eurycoma Longifolia Jeack is the herb name for what is more commonly known as Tongkat Ali, Malaysian Ginseng, or Longjack.



https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/23243445



Source: Evidence Based Complementary Alternative Medicine (2012) Methodology: Randomized, double-blind, placebo controlled, parallel group study. 12 weeks study in 109 men between ages of 30 and 55 years of age consisted of either treatment of 300 mg of E. longifolia or placebo.

Results: “The E. longifolia (EL) group showed higher scores in the overall Erectile Function domain, sexual libido, and sperm motility.” Erectile and libido increased in the 8.4%-8.7% range.



https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4085925/

Methodology: double blind, placebo-controlled, cross-over study. Participants consumed either 400mg of EIJ or placebo daily for 6 weeks.

Results: Eurycoma longifolia Jack (ElJ) has been shown to elevate serum testosterone and increased muscle strength.



https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/9353636 Experimental Animals 1997

“The study provivides evidence that E. longifolia Jack is a potent stimulator of sexual arousal.”



https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/10803359 Experimental Animals 2000

Result: “Results showed that E. longifolia Jack produced a dose-dependent increase in sexual performance.”



https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/24386995 Journal: Andrologia (2014)

“Eurycoma longifolia is a natural alternative to TRT and has been shown to restore serum testosterone levels, thus significantly improving sexual health.”



“Thus far, at therapeutic concentrations, no significant side effects of the treatment were obvious. Therefore, TA might be a safe alternative to TRT.”



https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3669033/ Journal of the International Society of Sports Nutrition (2013)

Methodology: 63 subjects, 32 men and 31 women. Randomized and placebo controlled over 4 weeks.

Results: “Significant improvements were found in the TA group for Tension (-11%), Anger (-12%), and Confusion (-15%). Stress hormone profile (salivary cortisol and testosterone) was significantly improved by TE supplementation, with reduced cortisol exposure (-16%) and increased testosterone status (+37%).

Conclusion: “This “ancient” remedy may be an effective approach to shielding the body from the detrimental effects of “modern” chronic stress, which may include general day-to-day stress, as well as the stress of dieting, sleep deprivation, and exercise training.”



https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/11693547 Journal: Archives of Pharmacal Research (2001)

Results: Eurycoma longifolia Jack “increases male virility and sexual prowess during sexual activities.”

Led to significant increases in testosterone and muscle.

Paradoxical Question:



Most organs shrink with age, so why does my prostate keep getting bigger? Simplified: Why does my prostate keep growing larger?





Metaphor:



Like a clogged drain. You remove the clockage.



















It’s like putting a cover over the drain in your kitchen sink, and then running the water. Some water will leak through most sinks, but most of it will be a backup. Plus think about what happens to sitting water over the course of days, weeks, months, and years. It becomes filled with bacteria, toxic, and rank. You don’t want this inside of you.



Imagine a garden hose that’s attached to the spigot. You turn the handle and water comes on. When there’s no clogging, the water fills the hose. The hose in turn becomes full, because it has the water rushing through it.



Now what happens if you were to squeeze the hose right at the connection of the spigot. Hardly any water comes through. You don’t get a powerful “spray” when you squeeze the handle of the hose. Plus the hose doesn’t fill with water and has less volume.



It’s the same thing with your prostate. When the connection to the bladder and urethra are clogged, most of the urine can’t pass through. It sits in your bladder, making you always feel uncomfortable and like you have to pee. Plus cGMP also can’t get through, and your penis remains limp just like that hose.

Background Story + Story of Discovery:



I don’t think this has to be overly dramatic. Instead I think it can be something pretty straight forward, like:

















Once guy hit forty he started noticing symptoms of BPH. At first they weren’t bad, but started getting more and more severe with each passing year. He’d wake up with the urge to pee and it was interrupting his sleep. Plus it was humiliating being at social functions and needing to use the bathroom again and again and again. Got to the point where it was effecting his life so much. Without sleep he was grump and irritable. He and his wife would fight more, his job suffered, he was feeling like less of a man. His doctor put him on Finasteride and he did experience some relief, but it wasn’t worth the trade off. He started growing breasts, he was having trouble getting hard, he even put on weight. So gets off Finasteride and tries just changing his diet and taking supplements. But the problem is that they aren’t working, he becomes unable to pee at all. Is rushed to the hospitable with an emergency catheter inserted. Told he could suffer long term bladder and kidney damage – they could even be life threatening. He’s feeling so frustrated. Why is this happening to him?

Isn’t there a better way?



So starts looking into the root causes etc. Realizes a glaringly simple problem: that all these medications only help with one part of BPH. But there are two. Plus the meds can stop erections. People don’t talk about it enough but BPH and ED are completely linked.

1. Who’s the Audience? 

 

Primary audience is men 40+ who are habitual snorers. They may also suffer from Obstructive Sleep Apnea, and if not they are definitely worried about it. If they are in a relationship, their chronic snoring is likely affecting it in a negative manner. If they aren’t in a relationship, they have anxiety about how their snoring will affect their long-term prospects.  

 

 

2. What are the pain points, or biggest fears? 

(+ identify the 1-3 HUGE ones, while the rest are secondary) 

 

- Short Term: 

 

Losing intimacy with their spouse. Their snoring keeps their significant other up, interrupting their sleep. As a result they’re having to sleep in the guestroom or on  the couch, which means a lack of intimacy in their relationship. End up arguing with their spouse, their spouse resenting them.  

 

For those not in a relationship, the fear of being alone. The fact that it’s affecting their love life because they’re afraid to stay the night with someone.  

 

On top of that, a fitful night’s sleep. Feeling exhausted in the morning because you didn’t sleep well. Being groggy with mental fatigue. Suffering at work, poor performance.  

 

If they have OSA, another pain point is having to wear a CPAP Machine. Uncomfortable and loud. Think of the bacteria and germs, you have to clean it. You certainly can’t travel with it.  

 

 

-Long Term: 

 

Long-term chronic fatigue can be deadly.  

 

OSA can lead to difficulty concentrating, ED, depression, irritability, learning and memory difficulties, even falling asleep while driving. Longer-term can lead to high blood pressure, heart attack, congestive heart failure, cardiac arrhythmia, stroke,  and depression.  

 

Also on a personal side, can lead to divorce, getting fired, you name it.  

 

3. So by reversing the pain points/biggest fears, what is the one big promise (1-3 sentences) you are going to make…how this will change their lives forever? 

 

















Sleep doctors and medical device manufacturers have been LYING to you. If you suffer from snoring or OSA, you don’t need surgery, a CPAP machine, or to spend hundreds if not thousands of dollars for a sleep study.



The truth is that you can quickly and easily stop snoring and reduce your OSA. It’s an “instant” solution, yet it works in over 95% of people who try it. It also costs pennies on the dollar, and there’s no surgery, machinery, or mouthguards required.





What solutions for the reader’s problem (s) exist already (and why aren’t they working for them)?



Nasal Strips – don’t work because the cause of your snoring isn’t your noise, it’s your throat tissue and your “collapsed tongue.”



CPAP Machines. These machines work by continuously blowing air into the throat at a slightly higher pressure than normal. The higher pressure acts to hold airways open, thus preventing oxygen deprivation and sleep.



Many problems with CPAP machines though. They are highly expensive and cost anywhere from $200 (for a crappy one) to $4,000 for a good one. They’re also not portable. On top of that they look ridiculous – you seem like an alien. They’re also noisy and they’ll interrupt your sleep and that of your spouse. They’re also really uncomfortable – it’s like trying to sleep with a scuba mask on. They also need to be cleaned frequently but that’s not always easy. And if you don’t clean them, your CPAP machine can fill up with bacteria and make you sick, increasing risk of pneumonia and pulmonary aspiration (http://www.medicaldaily.com/sleep-apnea- may-increase-pneumonia-risk-cpap-may-increase-pulmonary-aspiration-bacteria- 270464)





















Surgery – it’s hugely expensive and painful. You undergo a sleep study but takes weeks to schedule and then even longer to complete. The operation itself can take anywhere from $3,000 to $10,000. Plus there are no guarantees that it will work. Think about it, you’re removing part of your throat and trimming back of your mouth to make your airway wider. Who wants someone to slice up your throat and mouth? Also most sources agree that it’s “unlikely to cure moderate to severe sleep apnea.” You may need to combine it with other surgeries. So suddenly you’re looking at tens of thousands of dollars, and serious procedures that could keep you in pain for years to come.





















What’s the new claim/root cause/surprising info? And how does this new solution we’re offering them work?

(Think about it as if they had 99% of the solution already, but you’re sharing that missing 1%...the easy but unexpected REAL REASON, or REAL SECRET to their success).



The reason for both your snoring and Obstructive Sleep Apnea is your tongue! When you sleep your throat becomes relaxed and your tongue collapses to the back of your throat. This causes an obstruction.



Also your soft palate (the top of your throat) and your uvula (the dangling part at the back of your throat) are so close together that they vibrate against your throat. This vibration is what causes your snoring.





By simply having your tongue stay in the front of your mouth, it can’t obstruct the airway in your throat. Additionally it creates space between the uvula and soft palate in your throat so they can’t vibrate. The result is that you don’t snore, and you also don’t have Obstructive Sleep Apnea.



















What’s The Unique Mechanism?



A Tongue Retaining Device works by holding your tongue forward while you sleep. If your tongue can’t collapse back into your throat it won’t cause a partial obstruction. Plus it reduces the chance that soft tissue in your throat gets close enough together to cause the vibrations that cause your snoring sound.



Testable Proof: Try sticking your tongue all the way out and making a snoring sound. You can’t do it right!



FYI this was proven by a team of 7 medical doctors in a study published in the Journal of Clinical Sleep Medicine (https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2762714/)



They looked at 84 patients who had Obstructive Sleep Apnea, and had them use a Tongue Retaining Device. They found that their sleep apnea symptoms were cut in half when they used the tongue retaining device, and that intensity of snoring decreased by 70%!



The research is published in another study published in the journal Sleep. This one with 27 patients. (https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2675900/)



And a 2012 study published in the Journal of Clinical Sleep Medicine that was performed in a Sleep Clinic on 44 patients who had moderate to severe OSA. (https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3365084/)





Paradoxical Question:



Why do you only snore when you’re sleeping? Like we all know it’s “obvious” that people don’t snore during the day. But why?



Answer: just the mechanism (relaxed throat and tongue, causes vibrations).





Metaphor:



It’s like unclogging a drain. If a drain is clogged water can’t go through. If your throat is “clogged” then air can’t come through.



In both cases the “pipe” is restricted.





Bold Claim

















(What’s the huge promise about the results they’re going to get using this product/solution?):



You’ll stop snoring or at least significantly reduce your snoring on the very first night. And the results will last forever.





What is the Product?

(If you can write out fascinations here, it will help you immensely. This is the part where you get to shape exactly what the product we’re selling will include)



It’s called the RestMax snore guard. It’s the #1 Rated Anti-Snoring Solution of 2017 by numerous sleep research groups and institutions.



The RestMax is an FDA Approved Device that stops snoring the moment you start using it. Plus results are 100% guaranteed.



RestMax combats both snoring and sleep apnea giving you an uninterrupted and restful night’s sleep.



It’s professional designed and recommended by thousands of medical doctors and dentists alike. The RestMax Snore Guard is completely safe to use, BPA free, and made with medical-grade ingredients.



There’s no boiling, fitting, or biting. Plus it’s lightweight and comfortable. Just like any device it might take a few nights to get entirely used to it, but once you do you’ll completely forget you’re wearing it.



Additionally and unlike mouthguards and other devices that go inside your mouth, RestMax can be used even if you have missing or loose teeth, bridges, dentures, or crowns!

Mechanism & Background:



See attached spreadsheet Trinity x3 Ingredient Exploration for a background. Mechanism and background are primarily focused on these ingredients, supported by research which explains what they do, ie increases blood flow to corpus cavernosum. The CC is the part of erectile tissue that contains most of the blood in the penis during an erection. E.D. problems occur when either blood can’t reach the CC, or this “cavern” fills up, but then blood leaves the area during intercourse (leading to weak erections, or being semi-hard, or flacid). In general blood flow and circulation play a huge part in this stuff.



On the female side it’s actually much of the same mechanism: sexual arousal in the brain increases blood flow to the genital area. The vagina then becomes lubricated with fluid that seeps through the walls of the vagina. Due to the increased blood flow, the clitoris swells slightly and hardens, becoming more visible and sensitive to the touch.



Additionally for women arousal also starts due to increased heart rate and blood flow. The clitoris is made up of over 8,000 individual nerve endings.



So one interesting and surprising piece of information that can be included in the VSL is the fact that the physiological process through with both men and women get aroused is actually very similar. Even though men get erections and women don’t, in both cases the physical arousal is due to increased blood flow and circulation to the genital region.

Fortunately the ingredients in Trinity x3 are almost all oriented towards making this happen. As part of the testable proof of this – think about the fact that a woman’s clitoris hardens and swells during arousal, just like a man’s penis hardens and swells. This is GREAT news because it means that this simple solution of increased blood flow can make a huge difference for both men and women.
