Why Your Gut Holds the Key to Sickness (or Health).

At any given moment your body has more than a hundred trillion tiny, invisible organisms living inside of it.



They’re called “microbes”…



And they include bacteria, fungi, and even viruses.





















Caption: A picture of your gut’s microbiome.





Now while the idea of having trillions of tiny creatures living inside you might sound creepy… The truth is that they are ESSENTIAL to your health.

You see: most of these microbes live within your digestive tract (also known as your gut)... And they are responsible for a wide variety of important actions, including:

How well your immune system functions…



Your body’s ability to detoxify itself…



The production of neurotransmitters…



Your ability to breakdown and absorb vitamins and nutrients…



Whether you feel hungry or full…



And how your body breaks down carbohydrates and fats (which affects your blood sugar levels and your body weight).



In other words…



The bacteria in your gut acts like a “control center”…

















Something that’s responsible for virtually every process that’s essential to your health.



At least that’s what happens when your gut is healthy…



But when bad bacteria and toxins enter your system and begin to overrun your gut… It can lead to life-ruining, and even deadly inflammation.

What’s Inflammation?

Inflammation can be a normal and healthy response in the body… For example, if you cut your thumb…

Your body releases immune cells, hormones, and nutrients to fix the problem...



And white blood cells swarm to the cut to digest germs, dead or injured cells, and other foreign materials…



All in an effort to keep you from having an infection.



As a result of all this, your cut thumb will probably turn red, swell, and even experience a burning sensation as it happens…



Or in other words, it will be inflamed.



In a normal and healthy person, inflammation is a short-term response to injury or harm…



But when inflammation doesn’t stop…



And instead becomes “chronic” and ongoing…



It can lead to a whole host of problems.



Long-term inflammation can cause osteoarthritis…



Autoimmune diseases like lupus, rheumatoid arthritis, allergies, asthma, inflammatory bowel disease, and Crohn’s...



And it’s been linked directly to heart disease, increased rates of type-2 diabetes, cancer, depression, and even dementia and Alzheimer’s!



Now you’re probably asking…



















What Does Inflammation Have To Do With My Gut?

The answer is a LOT.



Remember, inflammation is trigged by your immune system…



And according to best-selling author and medical doctor David Perlmutter…



Your gut is home to between 70 and 80 percent of your body’s immune system.



So when pathogenic bacteria, viruses, fungi, and toxins assault your gut on a regular basis…



Your gut’s immune system responds by releasing inflammatory molecules that are harmful to your health.



The most infamous of these inflammatory molecules are cytokines…



And having high levels of these cytokines have been linked to a higher risk of stroke, heart attack, Alzheimer’s diseasei, cancer, and a whole host of additional health concerns…



Along with more than 100 autoimmune diseases that vary from fibromyalgia to psoriasis!





















Here’s How Pathogenic Bacteria Take Over Your Gut and Make You Sick…

There are a variety of ways that pathogens can enter your digestive system and cause gut inflammation...



For some of us, it starts at birth…



As research shows that babies who are born via C-section are much more likely to be exposed to bad bacteria during delivery…



And that this bad bacteria can stick with us for the rest of our lives. ii iii

































For others, the build-up of inflammation-causing pathogens starts happening when we’re toddlers…



Then continues year-after-year…



Through continued exposure to toxins in the air we breathe, the antibiotics and medications we take, the food we eat, the beverages we drink, and the surfaces we touch.



It’s Actually Shocking How Easily Toxins and Pathogens Can Disrupt Our Gut Health

For example, consider a common toxin in pesticides called glyphosate.



Glyphosate is used on many industrial crops and foods that end up making their way into the supermarket…

Then Of Course There’s All of the Common Additives in the Foods and Drinks We Love…

Like emulsifiers, which are found in many brands of ice cream, chocolate bars, mayonnaise, and packaged snacks.



Emulsifiers are what give these foods a smooth, stable consistency…



Yet according to new research published in the prestigious journal Nature…



These emulsifiers could very well increase the risk of inflammatory disease and metabolic disorders like diabetes and obesity…



By altering bacteria in the intestinal tract!ix







And Artificial Sweeteners Might Be Even Worse…

As, ironically enough, there is emerging research suggesting that they alter our gut bacteria in a way that leads to obesity and possibly even Type 2 diabetes!x xi

























So To Sum Up Everything So Far…

Your gut is home to trillions of bacteria and microorganisms…



These microorganisms are responsible for virtually every factor in your health...

















Over the years, foreign invaders like toxins, bacteria, and fungi build up inside of you…



They change your gut’s “make up” from one with primarily healthy bacteria to one with primarily pathogenic (or harmful) bacteria…



And these pathogens trigger a negative response in your gut’s immune system…



Which leads to chronic inflammation that increases your risk of hundreds of major diseases and conditions.



Make sense so far? Good!

So given what we’ve just discussed…



It’s probably pretty obvious what needs to be done to restore our gut health.



The Solution Is As Simple As Eliminating, Or At Least Reducing, the Pathogens and “Bad” Bacteria That Are Inside Your Gut…

So that your gut’s immune system stops being triggered on a constant, daily, basis…



And you reduce the inflammation in your gut that occurs as a result of a triggered immune system.



But how do you do that?



Most often, when people want to improve their gut health… They either change their diet or they start taking probiotics.

Both of these things are important and can absolutely be beneficial to your overall health…



But Changing Your Diet and Taking Probiotics May Not Do The Job On Their Own

By changing your diet and reducing the amount of sugars, simple carbs, glutens, and foods with additives that you consume…



You can reduce the amount of harmful toxins that you’re putting into your body on a daily basis…



















And increase the amount of beneficial nutrients and good bacteria you’re putting into your gut. Meanwhile by taking a high-quality probiotic…

You’ll also be increasing the amount of good, healthy, bacteria in your gut…



Which, in turn, can aid in better digestion and fewer auto-immune and inflammatory symptoms.



So yes, I’m absolutely saying that eating healthy and taking a high-quality probiotic are good ideas…



It’s just that, they aren’t the ultimate answer… And there are two reasons why this is the case.

First, improving your diet or adding a probiotic won’t necessarily destroy all of the unhealthy bacteria and pathogens that are ALREADY living inside your gut…



And second, even if you cut out unhealthy foods and increase good gut bacteria…



Your Body Is Still Going to be ASSAULTED By Toxins and Pathogens on a Daily Basis.

These foreign invaders are simply impossible to avoid…



They’re found in household cleaners, air pollution, drinking water, laundry detergents, beauty salons, you name it…

























And because your body is filled with tiny “entry ways” to the gut… Things like your eyes, your nose, your skin, your mouth, even your ears…

It’s simply unrealistic to believe you can keep all of these gut-wrecking and inflammation- causing pathogens out.



So what I realized is that if we really want to create an environment where our gut bacteria can thrive…



We Need to Figure Out a Way to Both Destroy the Bad Bacteria, Viruses, and Fungus Already Inside of us Right Now…



While Protecting Our Bodies From Future Attacks By These Foreign Invaders Too.

And I started looking for a way to do just that…



To find some kind of solution that can destroy pathogens inside the body… While essentially putting a “defensive shield” inside of our guts…

Something that will kill foreign invaders and harmful germs as soon as they enter us… And before they can cause gut inflammation.

I considered vitamins and diets that could support the immune system…



But I realized that because the gut is responsible for absorbing nutrients and vitamins..



If your gut is unhealthy right now, taking vitamins may be a waste…

















Because your body won’t actually be able to break them down and absorb them properly. I also wondered if it was as simple as telling people to get enough exercise and sleep… But realized that while both of those things are INCREDIBLY beneficial…

Getting 8 hours of sleep simply isn’t an option for lots of busy folks…



And not everyone has the time or ability to exercise five days a week either. So to be honest, I was feeling stumped…

But Then a Friend of Mine Told Me About Dr. Bryan Frank, M.D.





Dr. Frank is Medical Director of Full Circle Health Clinic in Edmond, Oklahoma…

















Where he treats patients with autoimmune conditions, Parkinson’s, Fibromyalgia/Chronic Fatigue Syndrome, Hepatitis C, and more.



Additionally, over the past three decades Dr. Frank has performed medical missions on five different continents, having traveled to over 55 countries.



He’s also authored numerous scholarly articles on medicine…

How Exactly Does Structured Silver Kill Bad Bacteria Inside My Gut?

Well here’s the answer…



Silver particles are “missing” an electron from their outer ring… And as a result…

When silver comes into contact with bacteria, viruses, or yeast… The silver attempts to steal an electron from the pathogen.

Now, because pathogens have simple water soluble cell walls made of single electrons… When silver steals an electron from pathogens, it ruptures the pathogen’s cell…

Kind of like if you were to “pop” a water balloon…



And this usually kills the pathogen right then and there.

These tiny healthy pulses of energy fire into the pathogens and prevent their DNA from replicating…



Kind of like a tiny magnetic spear.

Why Structured Silver Doesn’t Destroy Healthy Cells Or Good Bacteria In Your Gut

Healthy cells have a lipid bilayer…

Structured silver leaves your healthy cells intact… Where they are free to thrive and nourish your body.

These “beneficial” bacteria in your gut are also protected, and aren’t damaged or punctured.



















All of which is to say that Structured Silver is the perfect natural defender of your body… Because it ONLY kills bad bacteria and unhealthy cells…

While keeping good bacteria and healthy cells 100% untouched!

Why Your Gut Holds the Key to Sickness (or Health).

At any given moment your body has more than a hundred trillion tiny, invisible organisms living inside of it.



They’re called “microbes”…



And they include bacteria, fungi, and even viruses.





















Caption: A picture of your gut’s microbiome.





Now while the idea of having trillions of tiny creatures living inside you might sound creepy… The truth is that they are ESSENTIAL to your health.

You see: most of these microbes live within your digestive tract (also known as your gut)... And they are responsible for a wide variety of important actions, including:

How well your immune system functions…



Your body’s ability to detoxify itself…



The production of neurotransmitters…



Your ability to breakdown and absorb vitamins and nutrients…



Whether you feel hungry or full…



And how your body breaks down carbohydrates and fats (which affects your blood sugar levels and your body weight).



In other words…



The bacteria in your gut acts like a “control center”…

















Something that’s responsible for virtually every process that’s essential to your health.



At least that’s what happens when your gut is healthy…



But when bad bacteria and toxins enter your system and begin to overrun your gut… It can lead to life-ruining, and even deadly inflammation.

What’s Inflammation?

Inflammation can be a normal and healthy response in the body… For example, if you cut your thumb…

Your body releases immune cells, hormones, and nutrients to fix the problem...



And white blood cells swarm to the cut to digest germs, dead or injured cells, and other foreign materials…



All in an effort to keep you from having an infection.



As a result of all this, your cut thumb will probably turn red, swell, and even experience a burning sensation as it happens…



Or in other words, it will be inflamed.



In a normal and healthy person, inflammation is a short-term response to injury or harm…



But when inflammation doesn’t stop…



And instead becomes “chronic” and ongoing…



It can lead to a whole host of problems.



Long-term inflammation can cause osteoarthritis…



Autoimmune diseases like lupus, rheumatoid arthritis, allergies, asthma, inflammatory bowel disease, and Crohn’s...



And it’s been linked directly to heart disease, increased rates of type-2 diabetes, cancer, depression, and even dementia and Alzheimer’s!



Now you’re probably asking…



















What Does Inflammation Have To Do With My Gut?

How Exactly Does Structured Silver Kill Bad Bacteria Inside My Gut?



Well here’s the answer…



Silver particles are “missing” an electron from their outer ring… And as a result…

When silver comes into contact with bacteria, viruses, or yeast… The silver attempts to steal an electron from the pathogen.

Now, because pathogens have simple water soluble cell walls made of single electrons…



When silver steals an electron from pathogens, it ruptures the pathogen’s cell… Kind of like if you were to “pop” a water balloon…

And this usually kills the pathogen right then and there.

Background Story





















Commented [SG9]: Who I Am

So as I mentioned my name is Michael Giller…



And when my dog Zorro was diagnosed with cancer back in DATE…





It felt like I’d been hit in the gut with a hammer.



It had started with a small growth on Zorro’s spine…



A growth that the veterinarian had told me was “nothing to worry about”… Because it was just a “benign tumor.”

Well within a few months of first noticing the lump on Zorro… It was already starting to swell…

Zorro was having trouble with his vision…



He was walking into walls and peeing on himself… And he had ZERO energy and was very sluggish.

So by the time I took Zorro back to the veterinarian for a second opinion… I already knew what the diagnosis would be…

















Zorro had cancer…



And the veterinarian told me there was nothing that could be done. After that, Zorro lasted another six months…

During which time his tumor swelled to the size of a basketball.



-This Might Be Difficult for Michael But If He Has Any Pictures of Zorro With The Tumor Would Be Effective To Make It All More Authentic-



It broke my heart to see him suffering every single day…



He was a big dog, and a protective dog…





But he’d always been a bit fearful too…



And when you combined the fact that he couldn’t see, couldn’t walk, and could hardly even breathe…



There was only one choice that me and my family could make.



On DATE We Took Zorro to the Vet to Have Him Put Down…



And it was one of the most difficult days of our lives.



We gathered around him, our hands on his chest, as the vet euthanized him…

















And I’ll never forget watching, with tears in my eyes, as his breathing started to slow…































































































Commented [SG10]: I’m a dog lover just like you are. We had a family dog (just like you do).



It’s a very emotional story about his dog having cancer and dying.



Takes his dog to the vet but at first there’s a misdiagnosis, then secondly the vet says it’s too late. So clearly traditional solutions and advice not working here.



Then stopped entirely.



In the course of one year, Zorro had gone from a seemingly healthy, happy dog full of energy and love…





To a hollow shell of himself... And now he was gone.

It truly broke all of our hearts…



Zorro was part of our family..



Since the time he was a puppy, we’d fallen in love with Zorro… We’d taken him with us everywhere…

He was always by our side… He was our best friend.

-If there are any pictures of Michael and his family with Zorro, that would be great here -



After Zorro’s passing, I felt a strange mix of emotions…



I was filled with grief and sorrow to be sure…



















But I was also MAD.













































































































Commented [SG11]: Trigger Point + Search for Truth/Answers.



I was furious at myself for being so helpless…



And angry that I’d failed Zorro and let him down.



If you’ve ever had a sick dog before, you know what I’m talking about… When they lay there, looking up at you for help…

When you see the pain in their eyes… Yet there’s nothing you can do…

It’s one of the worst feelings in the world…



And it’s something I was determined to never experience again.



In the Months Following Zorro’s Death

 I Couldn’t Stop Thinking About His Cancer…



And I couldn’t stop asking myself “why had this happened?”



What had been the trigger that forced Zorro’s cancer to grow? We’d always gotten him plenty of exercise…

We took him to the vet regularly…



And I’d been feeding him an expensive brand of dry food from the supermarket that I thought was high quality…



So what else could I have done differently?



Was Zorro’s cancer just due to doggy genetic and bad luck… Or could it have been avoided?

For over a year I struggled with these questions…



But I didn’t seem to be getting any closer to an answer.

















Then, About A Year After Zorro’s Passing… Something Unexpected Happened.











































































Commented [SG12]: Meeting a third-party who helps facilitate the hero’s journey. In this case, it’s not a wise sensei with all the answers. But it is someone who inadvertently shows the avatar the way forward.



So that’s important to note…



Sometimes the catalyst is a “yoda-like” character… But sometimes it’s also just the unwitting teacher.



My friend Susan moved from the rural countryside to the city…



And her dog Misty began suffering from a whole range of health problems.



What was odd is that before moving to the city… Misty had been as healthy as can be.

Yet just within a few months of being in the city… Her health began going downhill fast.

Misty started getting these dry patches on her skin and shedding everywhere…



She was stinky all of the time (even after a bath)… And her breath was awful.

Even worse, poor Misty began letting out the most disgusting farts CONSTANTLY… And she was throwing up almost daily.

Well When I Heard Susan’s Story, A Lightbulb Went Off In My Head.



You see…



I found out that up until moving to the city…



Misty’s diet had been that of a “country dog”…



Meaning she’d mostly eaten scraps of meat, leftover fruits and vegetables that Susan and her husband had grown in their backyard, stuff like that.



Now in the city however, Misty was being fed dry kibble…



And even though it was a supposedly “premium” and “natural” brand...



The connection seemed pretty obvious to me:





















Ever since making the switch to supermarket dog foods…



Misty had been having an increasingly large range of health problems. Well my heart went out to Susan and her dog Misty…

But it also got me thinking…



If commercial pet food was giving Misty so much trouble after just a few months…



What was it doing to dogs who ate it their whole life?



And did supermarket dog food have something to do with Zorro’s cancer?



Now To Be Honest, I’d Always Been a Little Suspicious of Most Commercial Dog Foods…

Even the supposedly high-quality ones, like I’d fed Zorro.



That’s because despite all the marketing behind those “premium” foods… I’d often found myself looking at the ingredient list…

























Commented [SG13]: Paradoxical-ish question



Commented [SG14]: Inversion



Is something common and that you think of as “life-giving” really life-taking?

Commented [SG15]: Reflecting the suspicion that many people already have about big corporate business, ulterior motives, etc.



And wondering why there were so many ingredients with names I couldn’t pronounce. Yet as suspicious as I was…

I’d ultimately assumed that the dog food companies knew what they were doing…



And that they were dog lovers too… Who would want the best for our pets.

After hearing about Susan and her dog Misty however…



I decided to take a closer look at supermarket dog food…



To see if I’d been letting them off the hook too easily.

Commented [SG16]: Reflection of an experience avatar has likely had.















Commented [SG17]: Naivete, innocent nature of avatar, giving the benefit of the doubt.

















Unique Mechanism of Problem























Commented [SG18]: This whole following section follows what I like to call the “Paradise Lost Approach.”



I sometimes also refer to this as the Mayberry Method.



It’s great for comparing “traditional” products to your “innovative” products.



This method acknowledges that traditional products and solutions were invented with the best and purest intentions. But that over the years they were corrupted by some outside forces like greed, an egomaniac, laziness, evilness, whatever.

What I Quickly Discovered is That Dry Dog Food Has Changed A Lot Over the Years.



You see up until the mid 1960s…



Many people still fed their dogs “human food”…



Like meat scraps, vegetables, and other simple, whole foods.



In 1964 however…



As large corporate money started pouring into the pet food industry…



An industry lobbying group called The Pet Food Institute began a massive ad campaign…



With the explicit goal of getting people to stop feeding their dogs anything but packaged and processed dog food.



The Pet Food Institute spent more than $50 million a year on this ad campaign…



(Which is the equivalent to close to $400 million a year in today’s dollars)…’



















NOW!  A DRY DOG FOOD DESIGNED  FOR

FASTER, EASIER MIXING!























Funding “reports” that appeared in all of the popular magazines that showed the benefits of processed dog food…



And even producing radio ads about “the dangers of table scraps.”























Well the Ad Campaign Worked…

And By the 1970s More People Were Feeding Their Dogs Processed Dog Food Than Ever Before.



In other words…



By 1970s the average North American dog had gone from eating a high protein diet made with a few simple ingredients…



To a diet high in corn, wheat, soy, and all kinds of additives…





Commented [SG19]: The old ads here serve as credibility and proof elements for the mechanism of the problem.



And so we’re clear, the mechanism of the problem is:



Dogs used to eat whole foods like meats, vegetables, and fruits. Stuff that were fed from the table, back when we our food system was simpler and purer. But big money came into the system and created processed dog foods that were less natural.

Commented [SG20]: 1 sentence summary of the mechanism of the problem.

Commented [SG21]: Another proof element that validates the mechanism of the problem.















Foods that they NEVER would have eaten in the wild…



But that they were now being given on a daily basis by their loving, and well-intentioned

owners.







Here’s Why This Matters…

(This Part Is KEY To Understanding How to Keep Your Dog Healthy)…



Through my research I uncovered a pretty clear link between our dog’s changing diet and their

health.









In fact, as I continued to dig deeper and deeper I was shocked to discover that…



Between 1975 and 1995 the cases of cancer seen in dogs at veterinarian teaching schools in North America increased by 600%!i



And it hasn’t just been cancer either…



Today more dogs than ever are suffering from arthritis, bad breath, obesity, inconsistent bowel movements, shedding, allergies, and anxiety…



All of which have been linked back to diets that are high in grains, glutens, and other processed

foods.







Yet while there’s a clear link between diet and health…



I was startled to uncover that almost no commercial dog foods are doing ANYTHING about it…



Instead, they’re simply selling us their processed kibble as being “professional grade” or “like the wild”…



Yet the fact of the matter is it’s all a giant load of BULL.



For example…

Consider Blue Buffalo Life Protection Formula…



Which is marketed as having the “finest natural ingredients”… Yet contains a whopping 69 ingredients…















































































































Commented [SG22]: Showing flaws in mainstream products to further validate the mechanism.



Also serves to dismiss and discredit alternatives relatively early on.













Including: “Natural Flavor, Potato Starch, Caramel, Mixed Tocopherols, Ferrous Sulfate, L- Asorbyl-2-Polyphosrate, and Yeast”…



Along with numerous forms of grains.



Or the popular brand Taste of the Wild’s Pacific Stream Canine Formula…



Which is marketed as a “natural food” that’s “highly digestible.” Yet contains a staggering 43 ingredients…

Including things like: “Potato Fiber, Natural Flavor, Canola Oil, Sodium Phosphate, and Pyridoxine Hydrochloride.”

And when it comes to the Big Brands, they’re even worse…

As a quick look at Purina Pro Plan Savor Adult Shredded Chicken and Rice confirms. It contains 43 ingredients…

Including “Whole Grain Wheat (ingredient #3), Poultry Byproduct Meal (Ingredient #4), Soybean Meal (ingredient #5), Corn Gluten Mean (ingredient #6))…



As well as Whole Grain Corn, Dried Egg Product, Glycerin, and Animal Fat Preserved with Mixed Tocopherols.”



Now if you can’t pronounce half the ingredients I just listed out… You’re not alone.

And even though some of the hard-to-pronounce names in these dog foods are added forms of vitamins and minerals…



It doesn’t change the fact that these are ADDITIVES…

Inferior forms of nutrients that were either made synthetically… Or extracted from who-knows-where…

And that studies show aren’t easily absorbed by dogs.



























Unique Mechanism of Solution





And That’s When I Realized A Very Simple Truth:



If We Really Want Our Dogs to be Healthy, Then We Should Make Sure They Eat Like They Do in the Wild.











Commented [SG23]: Now that you know the real cause of the problem, the real solution to the problem is obvious!







But what do dogs eat in the wild?



I thought this would be an easy question to answer… But surprisingly…

There’s not a ton of data out there…



Probably because most dogs have been domesticated for so long, that we don’t really know. So I was feeling like I’d hit a dead end..

But Then a Friend of Mine Suggested I Look at the African Wild Dog.  



As the name would suggest…

Commented [SG24]: This isn’t exactly a “paradoxical” question, but it’s an interesting one. It’s something that most people don’t spent a ton of time thinking about. Or that they may instinctively think they know the answer to, but that upon further examination, they realize they may not.

















Commented [SG25]: This ties back into the “Paradise Lost” or “Mayberry Method.”



While our modern society has been corrupted, this is an example of a “society” that’s free of that corruption. And surprise, surprise, they don’t suffer from the problem and pain-points that our audience suffers from.



















African Wild Dogs live in Africa…



They typically weigh between 55 and 70 pounds… And what’s really remarkable…

Is that their average life expectancy is between 10 to 12 years.



Now the reason this life expectancy is surprising…



Is because the African Wild Dog lives in Sub-Saharan Africa… Which is one of the most unforgiving environments on earth. They’re CONSANTLY hunted by lions and hyenas…



























And are even ENDANGERED due to loss of habitat and hunting...



Yet despite all of this, the life expectancy of this wild dog is about the same as a domestic

dog.  	



How could this be?

Well for one thing, there are virtually zero reports of cancer or tumors in African Wild Dogs… While 1 in 6 of domesticated dogs will get cancer at some point in their life…

Including 50% of dogs over the age of 10 years old. And more importantly than that…

The African Wild Dog eats a very simple, clean, diet… Consisting of a LOT of protein…

As well as fruits, vegetables, and herbs.



You might be surprised by the fruits, vegetables, and herbs part…



But the fact is that wild dogs get these vital nutrients in a variety of ways… For one, they’re found in the digestive tracks of the animals they kill and eat…









Commented [SG26]: Again paradoxical and counterintuitive. Setting up a proof element here. Which is that even though these dogs live in crazy conditions and are hunted by lions, they live about the same amount of time as domesticated dogs.



This is going to lead into support for mechanism of solution

it’s because they are eating in the wild.







Commented [SG27]: Some stats/facts for further support and proof.















Commented [SG28]: Back to supporting mechanism of solution.

Commented [SG29]: Immediately addresses possibly skepticism or objection.

















But in addition to that…

































Commented [SG30]: Summarizes mechanism of problem and mechanism of solution in a serious of brief, easy-to- understand steps.



Research has shown that wild dogs also dig up fruits, vegetables, and herbs and eat them as way to supplement their diet.



Well as I read through the research on the African Wild Dog… As well as reports of wild dogs here in the U.S…

It All Started to Become Clear:

Our dog’s ancestors weren’t foraging through the wild for “dried egg product,” or “potato starch” or “natural flavor” or “pyridoxine hydrochloride.



Our dog’s ancestors weren’t howling up at the moon after coming across whole grain wheat, or poultry byproduct meal, or corn gluten meal, or animal fat preserved with mixed-tocopherols, or glycerin…



They were eating a whole lot of protein…



Along with fruits, vegetables, and herbs.

















Product Buildup + Reveal



So at this point the question became…



How Do We Get Our Dogs to Eat Like In The Wild?





To me the answer was obviously Raw Food. After all…

Our dogs eat raw meat in the wild…



So it makes sense that we’d want them to “eat raw” at home too, right?



It seemed like I’d found the breakthrough I was looking for… But as I started doing more research…

I Realized That Raw Food Brands Have Some BIG problems.

Commented [SG31]: Out-of-the-Box Solution



























Commented [SG32]: Out-of-the-Box Solution is Flawed





For one thing…



Even some of the most expensive brands of raw food had shockingly low amounts of protein in their guaranteed analysis…























And for another…



I quickly found out that raw dog food is expensive and doesn’t last long in the fridge…



Which means constant trips to the grocery store or pet food store for you… Or pricey auto-deliveries from an online retailer.

Plus, while I didn’t know it at the time…



Today, Research Has Shown That Most Raw Dog Foods Could Be Putting Your Dog’s Life in Jeopardy.

Now that might sound dramatic, but it’s absolutely true.



You see, according to a brand-new study published in 2018 in the journal Veterinarian Recordii…

















When researchers looked at 35 different commercially frozen raw dog foods… They found that…

80% had antibiotic-resistant E.coli…

23% had a second, even more dangerous form of E coli

43% contained species of Listeria

20% contained Salmonella…

11% contained dangerous parasites.

























Well if those findings aren’t enough to make you think twice about feeding your dog frozen raw food…









































































































Commented [SG33]: So has to do it himself.



I don’t know what will.



Of course the study I just shared with you is brand new…



And back in 2006 I didn’t know just how dangerous most brands of raw dog food really were… I just knew they were expensive and inconvenient…

And that there had to be a better way.



So I Enlisted the Help of My Mother, Who’s A Food Engineer and Biochemist By Trade…

And Together We Started Trying to Figure Out How to Make the Best Possible Dog Food on Earth.  	



- Picture of Michael and His Mom, ideally in the kitchen-





















Our goal was to formulate something that contained large amounts of high quality proteins… Along with a blend of fruits, vegetables, and herbs…

So that we could recreate what a healthy dog would eat in the wild…



And give them the nutrition that they needed to be healthy and to thrive.



After More Than a Year of Testing Different Recipes, We Finally Had a Few That We Were Really Happy With…

Recipes that contained 45% or more crude protein from sources like USDA Organic Chicken and Wild Caught Salmon…



Along with wholesome and nutrient rich foods like organic spinach, organic parsley, and organic blueberries…



And that were 100% GMO Free, Low Carb, Gluten Free, Grain Free, and with Zero Synthetics.



These were the kinds of recipes I knew dog owners could feel GOOD about giving to their pets…



And when I shared my recipes with our family vet… He told me that he was blown away…

And that “if this was for sale in stores, it’s exactly what I’d feed my own dog.”



Well that was great validation that we were on the right track…



But There Was Still a Major Problem…























Commented [SG34]: Alludes to trial and error.



















































Commented [SG35]: Another Problem + Setback





Which was that I knew if I was going to get these dog food recipes out there to world…



So that people could protect their dogs from the time they’re a puppy until they reach 12 years or beyond…



Then we’d need a way to safely transport and store the food we were creating…



So that anyone could enjoy the benefits of these recipes…

















Without having to drive to the store on a weekly basis…



























Commented [SG36]: Eventual Success + Breakthrough



Or worrying about feeding their dog frozen, dangerous raw food. So mom and I began brainstorming how we could do exactly that…

And In the Spring of 2006, We Had Our Breakthrough… 	



My father had just made a trip to San Diego, California…



To attend a natural health event at the Optimum Health Institute. While he was there…

He noticed that all of the health experts he met were REALLY big on food dehydrators… And that they were using these dehydrators to make raw foods that were shelf-stable… And that retained all of their nutritional value.

So my dad thought to himself…



“Why don’t we do the same thing with raw dog food?”



And before we knew it…



We’d purchased our first commercial dehydrator…



And were all working around the clock…



In an effort to perfect the dehydration process…



Taking raw, whole, and nutritious foods…



And then turning them into safe-to-eat, and convenient “dry” food…



Something that we could share with people all over North America and the world… And that would give them the nutrition of raw food with the convenience of kibble. Back then, we were doing all of this in my kitchen and basement by the way…

And while I didn’t realize it at the time…



















What we were really doing was starting a family business…



The business of saving dog’s lives.



By 2007 We Felt Like We’d Really Perfected the Art of Dehydrated Raw Dog Food…

And I knew that we had at least one big fan…



My new puppy Bran!



-Image of Bran-



Yet just because my dog LOVED our food and couldn’t get enough of it… I knew that didn’t mean every dog would.

So my family and I loaded up several cases of our food and brought them to our friend Sharon Hobbs, RN, BScn, M.BA…



-Picture of Sharon-



Who’s one of the most highly respected dog trainer in Canada…



And who works with dozens of dogs over the course of the year.



Sharon agreed to try giving our new type of dog food to the dogs she trained…



And then all we could do was wait to see what the results would be like. Well within the first week, Sharon was already ecstatic…

She called us on the phone to say that she was shocked by how much the dogs she trained loved our dehydrated, raw food…



And how she was already noticing that the dogs had healthier looking coats, cleaner poops, and better breath…



Along with more energy and a better mood.



“This is remarkable” I remember Sharon telling me…



















“I want to feed this to every dog I work with, and recommend it to every dog owner I come across…



How much can I get?”



Well we were thrilled by the results Sharon was seeing… And at this point…

Me and my family decided to go all-in on our raw, dehydrated good food recipes.



So in 2008 we found a building that was formerly owned by a food processing company and that fit our needs…



Bought our first commercial food dehydrator…



And launched Smack Dog Food.

Commented [SG39]: Product Details Start…



Why Every Dog Should Eat Smack…



Since 2008, Smack Dog food has grown slowly and organically to ensure our quality is never compromised.



Each batch is still artisan made and hand-crafted in our ultra-modern production facility in Canada…



And we use a special and unique dehydration process when making our food…



Something that dehydrates the raw, organic ingredients inside Smack Dog Food at low temperatures…



While rapidly drying the food to safe levels that are crunchy and delicious.



Our facility is inspected CONSTANTLY by third-party safety organizations…



We test every single batch of Smack Dog Food for safety before it leaves our facility… None of our foods have EVER tested positive for pathogens or mold…

And since 2008 we’ve never had a single incident or recall.



Plus on top of that, we’re even in the process of getting a full certification from the European Union…



Which is one of the strictest health certifications that any production facility can receive. Today there are thousands of happy Smack Dog Food customers all across North America… And they’re constantly telling us how their dogs are crazy about the taste of Smack…

And how good they feel about giving Smack to their four-legged family members. Now at this point…

You’re Probably Wondering About the Ingredients You’ll Find Inside Our Recipes…



















Well to give you an example…



Take a look at one of our most popular flavors…



Caribbean-Salmon Fusion.

Over 55% Wild BC Salmon (Bone-In)







Wild British Colombia Salmon - Graphic

Wild Salmon is an excellent source of protein along with Vitamins D, B3, and B12. It contains high concentrations of the essential minerals Selenium, Phosphorus, Choline, and Potassium. Wild Salmon is also loaded with choline, an important nutrient that supports liver function,

















brain development, nerve function, muscle movement, energy levels, and a healthy metabolism.



Millet Seed - Graphic

A great source of important minerals like calcium, iron, potassium, zinc, magnesium, copper, phosphorous, and manganese. Millet also contains plant-based fats, fibers, and protein. Eating millet seed has been shown to protect against type 2 diabetes, aid in digestion (eliminating gas, constipation, and bloating), and to fight cancer.



Coconut –Graphic-

Coconut contains the three healthy fats Caprylic Acid, Lauric Acid, and Capric Acid. Together these essential medium chain fats have hundreds of proven benefits. They improve mental performance, reduce inflammation and arthritis, prevent cancer, boost the immune system, promote lean muscle mass, and improve digestion. Coconut has also been shown to prevent gum disease and tooth decay. Finally, Coconut has been shown to promote healthy fur and skin, keeping your dog’s coat shiny and protecting against dryness and dandruff.



Organic Spinach –Graphic-

Organic Spinach is a potent source of Vitamins A, C, and B6, along with the minerals Potassium, Manganese, Zinc, Magnesium, Calcium, and Iron. Spinach is also filled with antioxidants. Eating Spinach regularly has been shown to improve vision, protect against cancer, strength the heart, improve metabolism, reduce inflammation, and prevent atherosclerosis.



Celery -–Graphic-

Celery contains minerals like Calcium, Sodium, Copper, Magnesium, Iron, Zinc, and Potassium. It’s also a great source of fiber, fatty acids, and vitamins A, B, K, C, E, and D. Celery has been shown to protect the body’s organs, reduce arthritis pain and muscular pain, prevent cataracts, and improve nerve health. It also boosts the immune system and has been shown to prevent cancer.



Organic Carrot -–Graphic-

Organic Carrot is an excellent source of beta-carotene and fiber. It’s also an incredibly antioxidant rich food, and a great source of vitamins A, C, K, and B8. Eating carrots regularly has been shown to prevent heart disease, lower blood pressure, boost immune health, improve digestion, and prevent cancer. In addition, eating carrots regularly can dramatically improve your dog’s vision!



Pineapple –Graphic-

Pineapple is loaded with essential minerals as well as vitamin C, beta-carotene, thiamin, Vitamin B6, and folate. Regularly eating pineapple has been shown to reduce inflammation of joints and muscles, protect against arthritis, stop excess gassiness, and improve teeth and gums. It’s also been shown to protect against shedding and to help fight cancer.



Organic Parsley –Graphic-

















Organic Parsley includes nutrients like Vitamin A, K, C, and E, thiamin, riboflavin, niacin, vitamin B6, vitamin B12, pantothenic acid, choline, folates, calcium, iron, magnesium, manganese, phosphorous, potassium, zinc, and copper. It’s also loaded with essential oils and antioxidants. Parsley is anti-diabetic, controls Rheumatoid Arthritis, has anti-cancer properties, and reduces inflammation. It also supports kidney health and the immune system and kills the germs that cause bad breath.



Thyme –Graphic-

Thyme has one of the highest concentrations of antioxidants of any herb in existence. It’s been shown to fight over 120 different types of bad bacteria in the human body. It’s anti-fungal and can prevent viral infections as well. Thyme improves circulation, boosts immunity due to high levels of Vitamin C, and promotes heart health.



Marjoram –Graphic-

Marjoram contains numerous organic plant compounds that have incredible health benefits. Regularly eating marjoram reduces pain, can prevent bacterial infections, supports a healthy brain, improves digestion, reduces stress, and boosts stomach health.



Peppermint –Graphic-

Peppermint provides relief from muscle and joint pain, is a great source of natural energy, and can clear out sinuses and provide allergy relief. Additionally, Peppermint removes dandruff, protects against lice and flees, and promotes a shiny, healthy coat of fur. Peppermint also reduces itches and promotes healthy skin. It’s also well known to help with digestion and reduce gas and irritable bowels. Finally, it freshens breath and can help protect against cavities.



And that’s it!



Just 11 simple ingredients that give your dog the nutrition he or she needs… Without any filler or additives.

Commented [SG58]: FAQS

Frequently Asked Questions





Is Smack suitable for large breed dogs and puppies?

Smack Pet Food is suitable for all life stages and breeds. We crafted the food with the proper amount of calcium (in grams Ca per 1 kg food) to properly grow the skeletal structure of both large and small breed puppies and dogs.

Should I be adding more meat to Smack?

We would urge against it! Smack diets are very dense foods! In one cup of Very Berry Chicken there is 10 ounces of USDA organic chicken (bone-in, with organs). This is what's in one cup of Very Berry Chicken:

How long will a bag last?

This depends on the age, metabolism, weight, and activity level of your dog or cat. For an average 50 lbs dog, a 2.5 kg (5.5 lb) bag of Crunchy Style will last 3 weeks.

Do I need to add water?

You do not need to add water - scoop and feed like you would kibble.



How do I introduce Smack to my dog?

If you feed your dog 1 cup of food, start with 1/4 dry cup of Smack added to 3/4 cup of the outgoing diet. Pay attention to how your pet responds and increase gradually over a period of two weeks.

How do you ensure Smack is safe from nasty bacteria and parasites?

The water activity level (measure of food safety) of our air dried meats are lower than the baseline required to inhibit the growth of pathogenic bacteria, parasites, and molds. The meat initially goes through a lethality phase during the beginning parts of dehydration, eliminating all pathogens.





















We take a lot of pride in our quality. As such, we test all the batches prior to leaving our facility. None of the foods that leave our facility for sale or resale have tested positive for pathogens or mold. Since we started in 2008, we have not had a single incident or recall.

Is your salmon free of chemical preservatives, like ethoxyquin?

Our wild BC pink salmon is free of chemical preservatives and is therefore ethoxyquin- free.

Why don’t you use added vitamins or minerals?

When formulating our foods, we went the direction of preparing them in line with holistic raw food diets which have been tested for decades, combined with our knowledge of functional foods. We did not want to add synthetic premixes to our food; we wanted to keep it natural, using nothing but whole foods with high bioavailabilities. Due to our gentle dehydration process, a high percentage of the amino acids, enzymes, vitamins, and minerals are not denatured or harmed resulting in high bioavailabilities. Not only can the synthetic premixes found in pet foods be hard on the organs but the bioavailability of these synthetic minerals can be as low as 4%!

Isn’t millet a grain?

Millet - often mistakenly referred to as a grain - is technically a gluten-free, non-allergenic seed with a low glycemic index and a surprisingly high antioxidant activity. Consumption of millet produces low blood sugars and creates higher insulin sensitivity, important for the increase of lean muscle mass and reduction of unnecessary fat.

The insoluble fibers in millet seed also increase the rate of digestion and reduce constipation. If that were not enough, millet seed is also a good source of tryptophan, an amino acid which raises serotonin levels, promoting better mood and reduced stress!

III. Unique Mechanism of the Problem 



Your metabolism is all of the processes that go on in your body in order to sustain your life.



Including the way your body converts food to energy… The depth and duration of your sleep…

The way your skin looks… And even your mood.



And metabolism is pretty much entirely controlled by a very important gland in your body called the Thyroid gland.



The Thyroid gland produces the Thyroid hormone.



And Thyroid hormones work in your body a lot like spark plugs work in a car.



They ignite fuel in your body’s cells, so that the cells can perform your bodily functions.



That means nearly all of your body’s functions depend on how strong your Thyroid gland is!



So picture food traveling down your throat and into your stomach…



Certain cells and enzymes in your body are meant to convert that food into energy… But if your Thyroid gland isn’t producing the optimal level of the Thyroid hormone… The spark plug never ignites…

The food never gets converted to energy…



It instead gets stored as the fat on your stomach, legs, butt, thighs, chest, and everywhere else you don’t want it …



And you don’t get any of the boosted, sustained energy you’re supposed to get from your food.



In fact, the increasing storage of fat just makes you feel more and more tired. It works the same way for falling into a restful sleep…

Commented [SG24]: Studies used as credibility and proof elements.



Your body doesn’t produce Iodine naturally. You have to get it from the nutrients you take in. Well as it turns out…

The two best sources of getting the natural, healthy Iodine you need, come from the sea.



The first is from Kelp.



Now you already know that almost every sea in the world has kelp in it… But you may not have known that kelp is an amazing source of iodine.

Not only that, but Kelp is also one of the most promising treatments for thyroid in existence.



In a study published in the journal of Endocrine Practice…



Researchers concluded that: “short-term dietary supplementation with kelp significantly increases both basal and post stimulation TSH [thyroid stimulating hormone].”iii



While in another study, this one published in the journal Clinical Endocrinology…



Researchers found that giving kelp supplementation to healthy men led to a “significant increase in the serum TSH response”…causing better regulated production of the two thyroid hormones T3 and T4.iv



And in yet another study, this one published in Clinical Pediatric Endocrinology… Where test subjects had been given powdered kelp once a day…

The scientists were shocked to see that the daily use of kelp had “restored their thyroid function and normalized their UICs [urinary iodine concentration].”v



The other best source of potent, healthy Iodine that the Thyroid gland loves to convert into Thyroid hormones T3 and T4 is called Bladderwrack.



Bladderwrack is a type of seaweed…



And just like Kelp, it has a significantly high concentration of iodine in it…



















And has not only been shown to help support healthy thyroid function… But to also have powerful potential for weight loss and liver health.

For example, in a 2016 study, this one published in the Journal of Applied Phycology…



Bladderwrack showed a “significant inhibition of lipase [the enzyme responsible for breaking down fats]”…leading the researchers to suggest it as a powerful “potential weight loss tool deserving of further investigation.”vi



So now we’re getting somewhere incredible…



We have two pure and potent sources of the Iodine your body needs to create the spark plugs, Thyroid hormones T3 and T4, that get your metabolism working awesomely.

Okay, can you explain how Total Thyroid works again?



Supporting your thyroid is actually a pretty simple process.



















In fact, there’s a simple scientifically backed three-step protocol for doing just that… And it’s something that I call the CAR method.

Step I: Construct Thyroid Hormones Step II: Absorb Thyroid Hormones Step III: Receive Thyroid Benefits



All three steps of the CAR method are crucial…



And the problem with most thyroid supplements is that they only focus on Step 1 – creating Thyroid hormones.



The reason that’s not enough is because your thyroid hormones are meaningless unless they’re actually absorbed into your bloodstream and your cells receive the benefits.



Total Thyroid does exactly that, but using a blend of 2 plants, and 5 minerals… Along with 6 additional thyroid improving ingredients…

Which have been shown in over 270 studies to support all 3 Steps required for healthy thyroid activity.





How is my thyroid responsible for weight gain, fatigue, depression, brain fog, mood swings, etc.?



Good question, and I get that at first it might not seem that obvious.



But remember – the reason your thyroid exists is to control your metabolism.



And your metabolism is what takes the fat and calories you eat…and breaks them down into energy.



When your metabolism isn’t working properly, fat and calories don’t get broken down. When that happens, you can’t lose weight. Instead, you’ll put on more pounds, and feel sluggish and gross.



Beyond just weight though, your metabolism also sends energy to your brain. So when it’s not working properly, your brain’s not getting the energy you need. And the result is feeling slow, mentally exhausted, like you’re in a fog etc.



Plus on top of that…

















If you’re one of the 40% of Americans with a thyroid dysfunction…



It means your body is failing during at least one of the 3 Steps in the process we’ve discussed.



So for example, it could be that your body is not creating enough T3 and T4 thyroid hormones…



That those hormones aren’t being absorbed by your body’s cells…



Or that even if they are absorbed, your cells aren’t able to receive the maximum benefits from them.



No matter which of the three steps you’re suffering from, the result is a hormonal imbalance…



Because your thyroid hormones aren’t interacting with your body properly.



And in all of those cases, the result is the mood swings, weight gain, depression, and exhaustion that come with hormonal issues.
